name: Haleiwa Bowls
tagline: North Shore's go-to for acai bowls and espresso drinks in the heart of Haleiwa town.
mustOrder: iced honey latte — pairs perfectly with an acai bowl
cold brew — strong enough for a post-surf revival
parking: Free lot behind Haleiwa town shops on Kamehameha Hwy
talkStory: Haleiwa Bowls nails that North Shore surfer-health-conscious combo. The acai bowls are some of the best on the island, and the espresso drinks are better than you'd expect from a bowl shop. It's right in Haleiwa town so you can walk to Matsumoto's for shave ice after. Come early before the day-trippers from town arrive — by 10am the line gets long.
